releaseNotes:
Update v1.2.2:

1. Password Backup: create an encrypted, passphrase-protected backup of all your saved passwords — Save it to your device (Download/PDF Manager/Backup) or Share it.
2. Password Restore: import a backup on any device. New entries are added automatically, name clashes are auto-renamed, and same-password duplicates are shown for review — an existing password is never overwritten.
3. Portable & Keystore-independent: backups are protected by your passphrase, so they survive reinstalls and moving to a new phone.
4. Stability and security fixes.
